name: Debasmita Bhattacharya
body: IICA — Indian Institute of Classical Arts
description: Recognized for taking the Sarod to global audiences with extraordinary virtuosity — bridging Indian classical heritage with contemporary international platforms inspiring a new generation of musicians worldwide.

name: Sandipan Ganguly (Bublu)
body: IICA — Indian Institute of Classical Arts
description: Honored for exceptional musicianship and dedication to Indian classical music — a virtuoso performer whose artistry continues to elevate the cultural landscape and inspire fellow musicians across the country.
